title: Benefit Plan
description: Represents a benefit plan enrollment for a worker within the Workday Benefits Administration system.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the benefit plan enrollment

descriptor.description: The display name of the benefit plan

planType.description: The type of benefit plan (Medical, Dental, Vision, Life, etc.)

coverageLevel.description: The coverage level (Employee Only, Employee + Spouse, Family, etc.)

employeeCost.description: The employee contribution cost per period

employerCost.description: The employer contribution cost per period
